response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience and deep technical curiosity, with notable contributions in DLang, event-driven systems, and open-source tooling, but lacks consistent, recent C++ development experience and direct exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, or cloud platforms like Azure — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Demonstrated expertise in event-driven architectures and message-based systems via open-source GIS platform.
Strong background in test-driven development, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices.
Proven ability to deliver high-performance systems using low-latency languages (DLang) and concurrency patterns.
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL work; most C++ exposure was years ago in LabWindows/CVI, not modern industrial contexts.
No clear evidence of experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards.
Lacks demonstrable cloud platform (Azure) or industrial protocol (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.) experience required for the role.
